title: Holly and Pete Ranney Saluted by Braves as Community Heroes
excerpt: The Braves honored Holly and Peter as Community Heroes. Players Dansby Swanson, Max Fried, Ender Inciarte, and Charlie Culberson surprised them at a makeover, presented a $5,000 donation, and helped move furniture. The couple was also recognized on-field during the game.
featuredDescription: Braves players surprise the Ranneys at a makeover and honor them on-field during Community Heroes Week.
